title: Modified papers for GCSE, AS and A level: 2014 to 2024
body: "These figures were originally reported as part of Ofqual’s annual access arrangements official statistics, published between 2014 and 2024.  Following the withdrawal of those statistics in 2025, the modified papers data has been republished in this separate release to allow continued access for users.  For more details, see the access arrangements statistics landing page. "
